title: ctenitis brevipetiolulata
intro: Ctenitis brevipetiolulata, also known as the short-petiolulate ctenitis, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as having potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
